# iMBRACE SDK - Full Reference for LLMs

> iMBRACE is an enterprise-grade multi-channel engagement platform. This SDK provides a unified interface to three core gateways: **App Gateway** (Stable/v2), **Server Gateway** (3rd party automation), and **Journey API** (Marketplace).

## Documentation & Links

### Getting Started
- [Overview](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/overview/) - Key features and architecture.
- [Installation](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/installation/) - Step-by-step package setup for TS and Python.
- [Quick Start](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/quick-start/) - Make your first API call in 60 seconds.

### Guides & Workflows
- [Authentication Guide](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/authentication/) - API Key vs Access Token strategies.
- [Full Flow Guide (E2E)](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/full-flow-guide/) - End-to-end examples for Assistants, Workflows, Knowledge Hub, and CRM.
- [Framework Integrations](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/integrations/) - Patterns for React, Next.js, FastAPI, Django, and Celery.
- [Testing Guide](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/guides/testing/) - Unit testing, mocking, and integration patterns.
- [Troubleshooting](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/guides/troubleshooting/) - Common errors, 401s, and double-path issues.

### API Reference
- [Namespace Resource Reference](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/resources/) - Detailed signatures for all 30+ namespaces.
- [AI Agent Deep Dive](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/ai-agent/) - SSE Streaming, TraceQL, Parquet, and Chat Client Sub-API.

## Core Technical Specs
- **Naming:** TS uses `camelCase` (e.g. `streamChat`), Py uses `snake_case` (e.g. `stream_chat`).
- **Org Context:** Always send `x-organization-id`. Controlled via `organizationId` or `IMBRACE_ORG_ID`.
- **Backend Routing:** Gateway routes most logic through `/v1/backend` or `/v2/backend`. SDK handles this automatically.
- **Retries:** Exponential backoff for 429/5xx. TS: 2 retries. Py: 3 retries.

## Implementation "Must-Knows"

### Critical Schemas
- **Board Item Create:** `fields: [{ board_field_id: string, value: any }]`. Note: Identifier field is usually required.
- **Board Item Update:** `data: [{ key: fieldId, value: any }]`.
- **AI Agent SSE:** Events start with `data: `. Payload: `{"type": "text-delta", "textDelta": "..."}` or `[DONE]`.

### Implementation Pitfalls
- **Workflow State:** Newly created flows are `DRAFT`. You MUST add a trigger and call `LOCK_AND_PUBLISH` before they can be triggered.
- **Conversation Params:** `conversations.list()` requires `type` (e.g., 'channel') and `view` (e.g., 'all') to avoid 400 errors.
- **Base URL:** `IMBRACE_BASE_URL` must be a root domain. Do not add path fragments.

## Resource Inventory (Selected)

### AI & Agents
- **`chatAi`**: Assistant CRUD, LLM completions, Knowledge Hub, File Extraction.
- **`aiAgent`**: Streaming Chat (SSE), Sub-agent, Embeddings/RAG, Parquet, Tracing.

### CRM & Automation
- **`boards`**: CRM pipelines. CRUD for `items`, `fields`, and `segments`.
- **`activepieces`**: Visual workflow builder. Mandatory ops: `UPDATE_TRIGGER`, `LOCK_AND_PUBLISH`.

### Messaging & Engagement
- **`contacts`**: Customer profiles, activities, and notifications.
- **`conversations`**: Management, assignment, status, and `listParticipants(id)`.
- **`messages`**: Sending text/media, comments, pins.
- **`channel`**: Config for WhatsApp, FB, WeChat, LINE, Email, and Web.

### Platform & IPS
- **`platform`**: Orgs, Teams, Permissions, and `listBusinessUnits()`.
- **`ips`**: Profile management and `listIdentities(userId)`.

## Service Key Registry (URL Overrides)
`gateway`, `platform`, `channel_service`, `data_board`, `backend`, `ips`, `ai`, `marketplaces`, `file_service`, `message_suggestion`, `predict`, `activepieces`, `ai_agent`.

## Error Hierarchy
- `ImbraceError` (Base)
    - `AuthError` (401/403): Invalid credentials. **No retry.**
    - `ApiError` (4xx/5xx): Has `statusCode`.
    - `NetworkError`: Connection/Timeout. **Auto retry.**

Override any individual service URL via `services` param or `baseUrl`.

## Gateway Overview

### App Gateway
Public REST API for client apps (web, mobile, integrations). Authentication: OTP-based (`x-access-token`). Path prefixes: `/v1/backend/`, `/v2/backend/`.

### Server Gateway
Private server-to-server API. Authentication: API key (`x-api-key` or `x-access-token`). Path prefix: `/3rd/`. Use for backend automation, bulk operations.

### Journey API
Developer portal for building, testing, and publishing custom apps (Journeys) to the iMBRACE Marketplace. Path prefixes: `/journeys/api/v1/`, `/journeys/v2/`.

## Resource Reference

### `client.auth`
OTP login flow: `signinEmailRequest(email)`, `signinWithEmail(email, otp)`.
Password login: `signIn({ email, password })`, `signUp(body)`, `forgotPassword(email)`, `resetPassword(body)`.
SSO: `signinSSO(body)`, `getLoginProviders()`.
Token exchange: `exchangeAccessToken(orgId)`, `exchangeAccessTokenWithToken(body)`.
Also convenience methods on client: `client.requestOtp(email)`, `client.loginWithOtp(email, otp)`, `client.login(email, password)`.

### `client.account`
Logged-in user profile: `getAccount()`, `updateAccount(body)`, `uploadAvatar(formData)`.

### `client.organizations`
Organization management: `list(params?)`, `listAll(params?)`, `create(body)`.

### `client.contacts`
Customer contact management: `list(params?)`, `get(id)`, `update(id, body)`, `search({ q })`, `exportCsv()`, `getConversations(id)`, `getComments(id)`, `getFiles(id)`, `getActivities(convId)`, `uploadAvatar(formData)`.
Also notifications: `listNotifications()`, `markNotificationsRead(ids)`, `dismissNotification(id)`, `dismissAllNotifications()`.

### `client.conversations`
Team conversation management: `list(params?)`, `get(id)`, `getByConversationId(id)`, `search({ businessUnitId, q })`, `getViewsCount()`, `getOutstanding({ businessUnitId })`, `create(body?)`, `join(body)`, `leave(body)`, `updateStatus(body)`, `updateName(body)`, `assignTeamMember(body)`, `removeTeamMember(body)`, `getInvitableUsers(id)`, `initVideoCall(body)`, `joinRequest(body)`.

### `client.messages`
Conversation messages: `list(params?)`, `send({ type, text?, url?, caption? })`, `uploadFile(formData)`, `addComment(convId, msgId, body)`, `updateComment(convId, commentId, body)`, `deleteComment(convId, commentId)`, `pin(convId, msgId)`, `unpin(convId, msgId)`, `getIndex(convId, msgId)`.
Message types: `"text" | "image" | "quick_reply" | "file" | "pdf"`.

### `client.boards`
Data boards (CRM-style records): `list()`, `get(id)`, `create({ name })`, `update(id, body)`, `delete(id)`, `reorder(body)`, `exportCsv(id)`, `importCsv(id, formData)`, `importExcel(id, formData)`, `getImportProgress(id)`.
Fields: `createField(boardId, body)`, `updateField(boardId, fieldId, body)`, `deleteField(boardId, fieldId)`, `reorderFields(boardId, body)`, `bulkUpdateFields(boardId, body)`.
Items: `listItems(boardId)`, `getItem(boardId, itemId)`, `createItem(boardId, body)`, `updateItem(boardId, itemId, body)`, `deleteItem(boardId, itemId)`, `bulkDeleteItems(boardId, body)`, `search(boardId, { q })`, `checkConflict(boardId, itemId, body)`.
Relations: `getRelatedBoards(boardId, itemId)`, `getRelatedItems(boardId, itemId, relatedBoardId)`, `linkItems(...)`, `unlinkItems(...)`.
Segments: `listSegments(boardId)`, `createSegment(boardId, body)`, `updateSegment(boardId, segId, body)`, `deleteSegment(boardId, segId)`.
KnowledgeHub: `searchFolders()`, `createFolder(body)`, `getFolder(id)`, `updateFolder(id, body)`, `deleteFolders(body)`, `searchFiles({ folderId })`, `createFile(body)`, `uploadFile(formData)`, `downloadFile(id)`, `deleteFiles(body)`, `generateAiTags(body)`.
Drive: `initiateDriveAuth(type)`, `listDriveFolders(type)`, `listDriveFiles(type)`, `downloadDriveFile(type)`.

### `client.teams`
Team management: `list()`, `create(body)`, `update(id, body)`, `delete(id)`.
Member management: `getUsers(teamId)`, `addUsers({ team_id, user_ids })`, `removeUsers({ user_ids })`, `listMy()`.
Join flow: `join({ team_id })`, `leave(body)`, `requestJoin(teamId, body)`, `approveJoinRequest(teamId, teamUserId)`, `updateUserRole(teamId, teamUserId, body)`.

### `client.workflows`
Channel automations: `listChannelAutomation(params?)`.

### `client.agent`
AI Agent management: `list()`, `get(id)`, `create(body)`, `update(id, body)`, `delete(id)`.

### `client.aiAgent`
SSE = Server-Sent Events (streaming responses consumed line-by-line).
Chat: `streamChat(body)` (SSE), `listChats(params)`, `getChat(id)`, `deleteChat(id, params)`.
Sub-agent: `streamSubAgentChat(body)` (SSE), `getSubAgentHistory(params)`.
Embeddings / RAG: `processEmbedding(body)`, `listEmbeddingFiles(params?)`, `getEmbeddingFile(id)`, `updateEmbeddingFileStatus(id, status)`, `deleteEmbeddingFile(id)`.
Chat-client (widget): `registerChatClient(body)`, `createClientChat(body)`, `listClientChats(params?)`, `getClientChat(id)`, `updateClientChat(id, body)`, `deleteClientChat(id)`, `streamClientChatStatus(id)` (SSE).
System: `getConfig()`, `getHealth()`, `getVersion()`.

### `client.ai`
LLM completions (`complete()`), streaming (`stream()`), embeddings (`embed()`). Assistants V1/V2 CRUD, assistant apps, RAG file management. Guardrails & guardrail providers (CRUD + test). Custom LLM providers, model listing, tool server verification.

### `client.channel`
Channel configuration (WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram, WeChat, LINE, Email, Web): `list()`, `get(id)`, `create(body)`, `update(id, body)`, `delete(id)`.

### `client.marketplace`
Products: `listProducts(params?)`, `getProduct(id)`, `installProduct(id)`, `createOrder(body)`, `listOrders(params?)`, `getOrder(id)`, `updateOrderStatus(id, status)`.
Templates: `listUseCaseTemplates()`, `installFromJson(body)`.
Files: `uploadFile(formData)`, `deleteFile(id)`, `getFileDetails(id)`.
Email templates: `listEmailTemplates(params?)`, `createEmailTemplate(body)`.
Other: `listCategories()`, `postChannelWorkflows(body)`, `downloadMarketPlaceFile(shortPath)`.

### `client.campaigns`
Outbound campaign management: `list()`, `get(id)`, `create(body)`, `update(id, body)`, `delete(id)`, `launch(id)`.

### `client.outbounds`
Send outbound messages via WhatsApp (with templates) or Email (subject, body, HTML): `sendWhatsApp(body)`, `sendEmail(body)`.

### `client.settings`
Message template CRUD (`listMessageTemplates()`, `createMessageTemplate()`, `getMessageTemplate()`, `updateMessageTemplate()`, `deleteMessageTemplate()`, `searchMessageTemplates()`, v2 variants). WhatsApp template listing (v1/v2). User management: `listUsers()`, `getUserRolesCount()`, `bulkInviteUsers()`.

### `client.schedule`
IPS scheduler management: `list(filter?)`, `delete(id)`.

### `client.sessions`
Session lifecycle: `list(params?)`, `get(id)`, `create(body)`, `delete(id)`. Workspace/directory-aware filtering.

### `client.categories`
Category CRUD: `list()`, `get(id)`, `create(body)`, `update(id, body)`, `delete(id)`. Org-level filtering, `apply_to` control.

### `client.ips`
User profiles: `getProfile()`, `getMyProfile()`, `updateProfile()`, `searchProfiles()`, `follow()`, `unfollow()`, `getFollowers()`, `getFollowing()`.
Identities: `listIdentities()`, `unlinkIdentity()`.
Schedulers: `listSchedulers()`, `deleteScheduler()`, `getSchedulerFilterOptions()`.
Workflows: `listWorkflows()`, `listApWorkflows()`.
External data sync: `listExternalDataSync()`, `deleteExternalDataSync()`, `enableExternalDataSync()`.

### `client.platform`
Multi-tenant admin (47+ methods): user/org/team/permission management, N8n workflows & credentials, app lifecycle, email senders, rooms, physical stores, Facebook auth, knowledge uploads, business units, contact management.

### `client.dataFiles` / `client.data_files` (Python)
Data-board file operations: `search(params?)`, `get(file_id)`, `create(body)`, `update(file_id, body)`, `delete(file_ids[])`, `upload(files)`, `download(file_id)`.

### `client.folders` (Python)
Data-board folder operations: `search(params?)`, `get(folder_id)`, `get_contents(folder_id)`, `create(body)`, `update(folder_id, body)`, `delete(folder_ids[])`.

### `client.chatAi`
Chat completions (`chat(body)`), chats CRUD (`listChats()`, `createChat()`, `deleteChat()`). File upload/extraction (`uploadFile()`, `uploadAgentFile()`, `extractFile()`). Audio transcription & TTS (`transcribe()`, `speech()`). Knowledge base CRUD. Custom prompts & tools CRUD. Document AI (`processDocument()`, `listDocumentModels()`). Assistant management (`listAssistants()`, `createAssistant()`, `updateAssistant()`, `deleteAssistant()`). Models: `listModels()`.

### `client.messageSuggestion`
`getSuggestions(body)` — AI-powered reply suggestion given message and optional context.

### `client.predict`
`predict(body)` — generic prediction endpoint.

### `client.activepieces`
Flows CRUD & trigger (`listFlows()`, `createFlow()`, `triggerFlow()`, `triggerFlowSync()`), runs history, folder organization, app connections (`upsertConnection()`), piece discovery, trigger testing, tables/records, MCP server management (CRUD + token rotation), user invitations.

### `client.fileService`
File upload (regular + agent), `listFiles()`, `searchFiles()`, `getFile()`. Download: binary, HTML, or text content. `getPublicDownloadUrl()`, `updateFileDataContent()`, `deleteFile()`, `deleteAllFiles()`.

### `client.license`
`get()` — current license info. `activate(key)` — activate by license key.

### `client.health`
Health check: `check()` — pings gateway root `/`.

## Error Handling

```typescript
import { ApiError, AuthError, NetworkError } from "@imbrace/sdk"

try {
  const contact = await client.contacts.get("invalid-id")
} catch (err) {
  if (err instanceof AuthError)    { /* 401 — token expired */ }
  if (err instanceof ApiError)     { /* err.statusCode, err.message */ }
  if (err instanceof NetworkError) { /* connectivity issue */ }
}
```

- [App Gateway — Teams](https://devportal.dev.imbrace.co/docs/api-document/app-apis/team)
- [App Gateway — Workflows](https://devportal.dev.imbrace.co/docs/api-document/app-apis/workflow)

## Docs

Full documentation files (plain Markdown, AI-readable):

### Using the SDK

- [Overview](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/overview.md): SDK features, namespaces, credential selection
- [Installation](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/installation.md): Package setup and credential configuration
- [Quick Start](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/quick-start.md): First API call in 60 seconds
- [Authentication](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/authentication.md): API Key vs Access Token, OTP login flow
- [Full Flow Guide](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/full-flow-guide.md): End-to-end walkthroughs — assistants, workflows, knowledge hub, boards
- [Resource Reference](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/resources.md): Every namespace and method (chatAi, boards, contacts, conversations, messaging…)
- [AI Agent](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/ai-agent.md): Streaming chat, embeddings, parquet, tracing, Chat Client sub-API
- [Error Handling](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/error-handling.md): Error types, retry behavior, best practices
- [Integrations](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/integrations.md): React, Next.js, Node.js, FastAPI, Django, Celery, OTP login flow
- [Local Testing](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/sdk/local-testing.md): Test the built package locally before publishing
- [Getting Started — Overview](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/getting-started/overview.md): Platform introduction
- [Getting Started — Setup](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/getting-started/setup.md): Environment and credentials setup
- [Testing Guide](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/guides/testing.md): Unit tests, integration tests, coverage, lint
- [Troubleshooting](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/guides/troubleshooting.md): Common errors and fixes
- [Vibe Coding](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/guides/vibe-coding.md): Use llms.txt with Claude, Cursor, Copilot to code faster with the SDK

### Project & Development

- [API Overview](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/api-overview.md): Three gateways, environments, auth modes, all 30+ namespaces
- [Architecture](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/architecture.md): Monorepo structure, source layout, TS/Python naming conventions
- [Development Guide](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/development.md): Dev setup, build, test, lint for contributors
- [Release Process](https://imbraceltd.github.io/api-sdk/releasing.md): CI/CD pipelines, npm and PyPI publishing via git tags
